overview: Giant Jellyfish (Small Jellyfish) is a Normal-class Beast monster. 2 grades: Common, Elite. Base stats (Common): 0 HP, 20 physical damage, 185 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 1, MaxImpactEndurance 1. 1 attack, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Explosion at 100% ratio (200 base damage).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.
